expertAssessments.rationale: CPU ranking and stream metadata were grounded, but the follow-up formatting-only rewrite did not reuse the previous answer context by default and did not preserve all server IDs/values after clarification skip.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Fix the formatting-only follow-up path so '위 답변...' requests bypass server-scope clarification, reuse the prior assistant answer, and preserve all requested server IDs/values and sentence count.

expertAssessments.rationale: The dashboard, logs rolling range label, Cloud Run health, and Analyst monitoring output all matched the current synthetic OTel source and exposed concrete timestamps/server evidence.
Vercel production, Cloud Run health, usage checks, and free-tier guardrails were healthy after the browser QA.

Playwright MCP covered route rendering, visible UI submission, network requests, localStorage metadata, console cleanliness, and durable screenshot evidence; the run caught a concrete AI follow-up regression.
CPU ranking, log range, and Analyst warning output used current monitoring data and preserved concrete server IDs/values for the primary ranking flow.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after Vercel Playwright MCP QA; effective 2.0188 USD, billed remains 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 1827.
Free-tier guardrails intact: maxScale=1, concurrency=16, timeout=300, cpu=1, memory=512Mi, cpu-throttling=true, latestReadyRevision=ai-engine-00411-xgg.

completedImprovements.title: plannerShadow latency metadata no longer collapses to 0ms for fast production shadow decisions
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright MCP localStorage metadata showed plannerShadow.latencyMs=5 for CPU top-3 and latencyMs=1 for the rewrite stream response.

pendingImprovements.title: Formatting-only follow-up rewrite should reuse prior answer context and preserve all listed server IDs/values
pendingImprovements.note: release-blocking 아님; v8.11.96 Playwright MCP에서 '위 답변을 운영 보고서용 2문장...'이 먼저 server-scope clarification UI로 막혔고, '건너뛰고 바로 실행' 후에도 1문장만 반환하며 cache-redis-dc1-01/cache-redis-dc1-03 값이 누락됨. 최근 polish의 목표였던 formatting-only 품질 보강은 추가 수정 필요.

notes: release decision: conditional because the deployed app is healthy and core monitoring/AI ranking flows pass, but formatting-only follow-up rewrite still has a user-facing context-preservation regression.
mode audit: CPU top-3 routeDecision executionPath=stream, mode=single, decidedBy=cloud-run; plannerShadow candidate deterministic metric_lookup matched local stream path with latencyMs=5.

formatting rewrite route audit: default prompt hit clarification UI; skip path used /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2, did not call /api/ai/jobs, and exposed plannerShadow drift execution_mode_mismatch with latencyMs=1.
